input.topic: the Fermi paradox and why we haven't heard from aliens

sections.title: The math
sections.content: Drake's equation suggests millions of civilizations; we observe none. The great silence.

sections.title: The zoo hypothesis
sections.content: Maybe they're watching. Ball proposed in 1973 that advanced civilizations deliberately avoid contact.

sections.title: The great filter
sections.content: Some step in the path from single cells to interstellar travel is wildly improbable.
